rationale.consumer_value_basis: Determines what knowledge each cohort class can access — directly governs product value by tier.

rationale.layer_choice: Production rule gate that enforces cohort boundaries at runtime — candelabra_core because it is the access-control spine of the Librarian system.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Guarantees that members only access corpus appropriate to their cohort class — foundation of trust and fairness.

rationale.layer_choice: Earned-unlock discipline is a day-1 product feature governing when members gain access to Cue Cards — core to the Librarian engagement loop.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Motivates consistent daily engagement by tying capability access to demonstrated commitment.

rationale.layer_choice: Personal-scale Librarian composes with Candelabra — cooperative_datacenter_dream because it extends cooperative substrate ownership to individual members without requiring institutional membership.

rationale.layer_choice: Load-bearing MCP tool — called at session start by every agent to bootstrap canonical context. The primary interface between agents and the Librarian substrate.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Eliminates 20+ minutes of context re-loading per session — the most immediate time-savings delivered by the Librarian product.

rationale.layer_choice: Civilization-scale Librarian extends the cooperative substrate model to global knowledge commons — cooperative_datacenter_dream because it is the ultimate vision of the cooperative knowledge infrastructure.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Positions the cooperative as the steward of civilization-scale knowledge infrastructure — ultimate long-term value proposition for all members.

primitive_name: Federation vs Non-Federation Scribe Sharing — Organism Boundary Rule

rationale.layer_choice: Federation boundary doctrine governs cross-organism Scribe sharing — cooperative_datacenter_dream because it enables the multi-organism substrate network without exposing proprietary Scribes.
rationale.moat_basis: Organism-boundary Scribe governance is unique to the cooperative model — requires membership trust lattice that competitors cannot replicate.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Enables cross-initiative knowledge sharing within the cooperative while protecting each organism public corpus boundaries.

rationale.layer_choice: Furnace is a patent-reserve defense mechanism — its currency-burning mechanics create strong IP moat but are not a hard day-1 dependency.
rationale.moat_basis: Central currency destruction for bad actors is novel and patentable, creating a deterrent no competitor currently has.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Indirectly protects all members by removing bad actors economic incentive to exploit the platform.

rationale.layer_choice: Slow Blade V2 8-vector is the load-bearing adversarial defense stack required from platform day-1.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Protects all members from bad actors directly and visibly, making the platform trustworthy.

rationale.moat_basis: Enumerated trigger conditions for platform defense create a specific, novel, patentable mechanism no competitor has codified.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal trigger logic invisible to consumers but foundational to making Slow Blade reliably fire when needed.

rationale.layer_choice: Trust Match is a patent-reserve reputation-pairing layer — high moat value for IP filing, positioned as platform differentiator.

rationale.layer_choice: Seasoning accumulates time-in-platform credibility and forms the temporal dimension of the Slow Blade defense stack, filing-ready but not day-1 critical.

rationale.moat_basis: Mandatory radical transparency for all platform actors creates a trust environment no opaque competitor can match or easily replicate.

rationale.layer_choice: Glass Door is a candelabra_core transparency mechanism — platform actors cannot hide their ratings, history, or behaviors from counterparties, foundational from day-1.

rationale.consumer_value_basis: Members gain IP protection for their cooperative innovations, making the platform uniquely safe for sharing novel approaches.

primitive_name: Brick Wall write-without-asking (advance permissions discipline for agents)

rationale.layer_choice: Agent write-without-asking discipline is load-bearing for all autonomous execution — candelabra_core
rationale.moat_basis: Structured advance permission scope prevents agent paralysis in complex multi-step tasks
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal discipline; enables faster task completion without founder approval bottlenecks

rationale.layer_choice: Standalone patent filing candidate for pre-granted agent action scope framework — patent_reserve
rationale.moat_basis: Formalized advance permission system for AI agents is novel and patentable
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal discipline concept with potential commercial licensing value

rationale.layer_choice: Bishop↔Knight restart protocol is multi-agent coordination — cooperative_datacenter_dream
rationale.moat_basis: Cross-agent restart protocol with state preservation is novel coordination mechanism; Crown-Jewel-class per BP015 eblet
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal only; enables reliable multi-agent collaboration recovery

rationale.layer_choice: Session handoff baton passes operational state between agents — cooperative_datacenter_dream
rationale.moat_basis: Structured continuous-prep-and-fire discipline prevents context loss across multi-agent sessions; Crown-Jewel-class per BP015 eblet; Founder coal-train metaphor
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal only; enables seamless session continuity for faster delivery (~18% throughput gain per BP015 empirical receipt)

primitive_name: Crown Jewels — 228 Innovations with No Prior Art Found

rationale.layer_choice: 228 innovations with no prior art form the pure IP moat, the deepest stratum of the patent reserve.
rationale.moat_basis: Zero prior art across 228 innovations means these claims face no anticipation defense — maximum enforceability.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Indirectly protects all consumer-facing features; directly communicated as platform legitimacy signal.

rationale.layer_choice: Active legal foundation with 15 filed provisionals anchors the patent protection layer as a core candelabra element.
rationale.moat_basis: 15 provisional applications covering 2,506 formal claims creates a first-mover legal perimeter competitors cannot retroactively file around.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal legal infrastructure only; consumers benefit indirectly through platform IP protection.

primitive_name: Formal Claims Corpus — 2,506 Claims Across 15 Provisionals

rationale.layer_choice: Claims corpus is pure patent reserve — legally filed language that defines the IP boundaries of the platform.
rationale.moat_basis: 2,506 formal claims across 15 provisionals provide legally defensible coverage depth that takes years to replicate.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: No direct consumer value; backend legal infrastructure that enables investor and partner conversations.

rationale.layer_choice: The full innovation catalog is the patent reserve raw feedstock — the superset from which formal claims and crown jewels are drawn.
rationale.moat_basis: 2,270 catalogued innovations represent 37 years of Founder IP with timestamped A&A evidence chain creating defensible prior-art of inventorship.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Indirectly powers all platform features; catalog itself is internal IP infrastructure.

rationale.layer_choice: The constitutional IP waterfall distributes patent value across the cooperative — core candelabra financial architecture.
rationale.moat_basis: 60% patent-bucket distribution to member participants creates self-reinforcing IP creation incentives unlike any competitor model.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Members directly benefit via patent pedestal allocations; Herjavec RPA window creates 20-year revenue waterfall for creator slice.

primitive_name: A&A Formal Pipeline (Advance & Authenticate Innovation Extraction)

rationale.layer_choice: Day-1 innovation tracking process is the operational engine of the candelabra -- without A&A formalization, no innovations reach the patent reserve.
rationale.moat_basis: 218 filed A&A documents with timestamped innovation-extraction creates an auditable chain of inventorship that establishes priority dates.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Pipeline is internal operational infrastructure; output (innovations, crown jewels, provisionals) eventually reaches consumers as platform features.

rationale.layer_choice: The claim architecture taxonomy organizing 2,506 formal claims into strategic layers is pure patent reserve infrastructure.
rationale.moat_basis: A structured foundational claim architecture enables claim chaining and continuation strategy that multiplies IP coverage exponentially.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Architectural framework only; consumer value is fully mediated through the provisionals and eventual patent grants it organizes.

primitive_name: Social-DAG Canon (Directed Acyclic Graph Social Architecture)

rationale.layer_choice: The social DAG is the relational data architecture of the cooperative — the cooperative datacenter dream foundational graph structure.
rationale.moat_basis: A DAG-enforced social graph prevents circular dependency corruptions common in social platforms and enables novel IP-sharing propagation chains.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Directly powers member connections, initiative participation, and cooperative relationship webs — high direct consumer value.

primitive_name: R&D Battery (Dispatch/Battery Prioritization for Innovation Development)

rationale.layer_choice: The dispatch/battery system orchestrates the innovation development pipeline -- cooperative datacenter dream operational scheduler.
rationale.moat_basis: Priority-weighted R&D dispatch ensures highest-moat innovations are developed first, creating compounding advantage over time.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Internal dispatch system only; consumers experience its output as faster feature delivery and higher-quality platform capabilities.

primitive_name: Pheromone-Anchored Decisions (Founder Decisions Written to Pheromone Substrate)

rationale.layer_choice: Pheromone substrate writes Founder decisions into the cooperative memory fabric -- cooperative datacenter dream persistence layer.
rationale.moat_basis: Pheromone-anchored decision permanence creates an auditable AI governance trail that no competitor AI platform currently offers.
rationale.consumer_value_basis: Fully internal substrate mechanism; consumers benefit indirectly through consistent platform behavior driven by Founder-ratified decisions.
